text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, Asia/Tokyo is UTC + 9, so the time difference is 19 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 06:00 + 19 hours = 01:00 (next day).
3. Adjust the date: Since we've passed midnight, the date becomes August 19, 1669.
FINAL_ANSWER: 01:00 on August 19, 1669
